steps.title: Compare equivalent expressions
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, the correct expression must match the original expression for every allowed input. Here, both terms in $18mn-9mn$ have the same variable factor, so they can be combined as like terms.

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
$18mn$ and $9mn$ have the same variable factor, $mn$, so subtract only the coefficients.
$$18mn-9mn=(18-9)mn=9mn$$

steps.title: Keep the variable factor
steps.content: The result must still include $mn$ with coefficient $9$. Choices that drop $mn$ lose the variable factor, and $mn$ alone is missing the coefficient. The answer is D.
